reference: Eating is one of the most pleasurable events in life, but it should remain within our reach so that complications are prevented. Please have a glass of water before each meal, and add one full cucumber before each major meal so that satiety is achieved early. You can try Ayurslim, two capsules twice a day for six months.
text: Reading is wonderful, but more than that, a good human being cannot reach the foundations of life. We ourselves are born human, but at one point we become for each major meal, but society is a stupid ruin. You think by arson, you thus will spoil today or tomorrow.
